sprint: Doc Consolidation — Single Source of Truth

tasks.name: Audit content overlap
tasks.notes: Overlap map: user-guide.md has 20 sections missing from readme.md — manual install, what-writes table, what-NOT-do, --skill flag table, uninstall, local/remote registration detail, non-Claude providers, SSH key migration, run-prompt/command/send-files/check-status examples, multi-provider auth, CLI install, capabilities/limits, mix-and-match example, GitHub App (Apra Labs + custom + PAT), Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, PM commands table, troubleshooting. AGENTS.md links to user-guide.md (to fix in 2.2). CLAUDE.md is currently plan-execution context; Task 2.3 rewrites it as thin wrapper.

tasks.name: Update CI and llms.txt to stop referencing docs/user-guide.md
tasks.notes: Updated gen-llms-full.mjs: path changed from docs/user-guide.md to readme.md, title updated to Readme. Updated llms.txt: User Guide link replaced with Readme link. Regenerated llms-full.txt (38798 bytes, 5 docs) — no user-guide references remain.

tasks.name: VERIFY 1
tasks.notes: PASS: node scripts/gen-llms-full.mjs succeeded; llms-full.txt has no docs/user-guide.md refs (other docs have relative user-guide.md refs that will be fixed in 2.2); llms.txt clean; gen-llms-full.mjs references readme.md. Pushed to origin.

tasks.name: Absorb docs/user-guide.md into readme.md
tasks.notes: Merged all 20 missing sections into readme.md using <details> collapsibles for long blocks: manual install, what-writes table, what-NOT-do, --skill flag table, uninstall, local/remote registration detail, non-Claude providers, SSH key migration, run-prompt/command/send-files/check-status examples, multi-provider auth/CLI/capabilities, mix-and-match example, GitHub (Apra Labs + App + PAT), Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, PM commands table, troubleshooting section.

tasks.name: Delete docs/user-guide.md and fix all references
tasks.notes: Deleted docs/user-guide.md via git rm. Fixed see-also comments in 7 docs files (adr-oob-password.md, architecture.md, cloud-compute.md, design-git-auth.md, FAQ.md, provider-matrix.md, ssh-setup.md, vocabulary.md) and Related docs link in FAQ.md. Fixed AGENTS.md Links section. Regenerated llms-full.txt (49567 bytes). Grep confirms zero user-guide refs in tracked source (excluding PLAN.md, progress.json, feedback.md as PM project docs; AWS URL in src/services/cloud/aws.ts as expected exclusion).

tasks.name: Rewrite CLAUDE.md as thin wrapper
tasks.notes: Replaced 38-line plan-execution context with 18-line thin wrapper: directive to read readme.md, dev commands (npm install/build/test/binary), branch/commit conventions. Under 30 lines, no duplicated readme content.

tasks.name: Rewrite AGENTS.md as thin wrapper
tasks.notes: Replaced 122-line full tools reference with 19-line thin wrapper: directive to read readme.md, dev commands, branch/commit conventions, link to architecture.md. Under 30 lines, no duplicated readme content.

tasks.name: VERIFY 2 (Final)
tasks.notes: PASS: npm run build clean; npm test 730 passed / 19 pre-existing auth-socket timeouts (unrelated to doc changes); gen-llms-full.mjs succeeded (49567 bytes, 5 docs); readme.md comprehensive; CLAUDE.md=18 lines, AGENTS.md=19 lines (both <30); docs/user-guide.md deleted; only userguide ref is expected AWS external URL in src/services/cloud/aws.ts; llms-full.txt clean. Pushed to origin.
